mapper.select:
SELECT qab.*, qad.findings, qad.opinion, qad.record FROM qs_audit_base_data qab LEFT JOIN qs_audit_divide_detail qad ON qab.id = qad.directory_id WHERE qab.type = #{type} AND qad.divide_id = #{divideId} AND qad.opinion = #{subject}
AND qab.directory like CONCAT('%',#{dir},'%')
AND qab.content like CONCAT('%',#{content},'%')
AND qab.method like CONCAT('%',#{method},'%')
SELECT qab.*, qad.findings, qad.opinion, qad.record FROM qs_audit_base_data qab LEFT JOIN qs_audit_divide_detail qad ON qab.id = qad.directory_id WHERE qad.divide_id = #{divideId}
